prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to badger testing regulations and procedures enforced by the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA) in England. It does not apply to Scotland as devolved government in Scotland manages wildlife protection and agricultural health independently.
